item.title: It's the unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i think they're cool. jk i don't
is Randy short for Randall? ive never thought about this. Randrew?
not really my style although eye patches usually look cool
that's a cool bean carrier
it was famous artist Kevin C
was this painting really necessary? yes.
I only need 1 word
i am terrified of all ocean depths
not wrong
i guess they think it's in the water somewhere
mmm hmm
sorry
i feel like Yamaha has the most diverse product catalog
this had no sound but i'm posting it bc it really messes with my claustropobia. am i the only one who would freak out in there? couldnt do it
i'd eat that right now
i have questions
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Here’s an image...
item.description:
Here's an image of the moment Dr Katie Bouman saw the first render of a black hole. She developed the imaging algorithm.
Here’s an image from the 2020 Oregon wildfires.
Here’s one of the very last images sent by the Mars Opportunity Rover in June 2018.
Here’s America's response to the COVID-19 global pandemic all boiled down to one image.
Here’s an image that is banned in China. Pooh became a common nickname for Xi Jinping around 2013.
Here’s an image of someone with a normal, decent sense of humour.. and is not ‘rapey’ and insane.
Here’s an image of the aftermath of a mid 90s sleepover.
Here’s an image of the damage from a 2021 tornado in Mayfield, Ky.
Here’s an image of cotton harvesting not an outdoor concert.
Here’s an image of some dude.
Here’s an image of what you should do if Vladimir Putin ever offers you tea.
Here’s an image of President Donald Trump being released from Walter Reed Medical Centre after battling Covid in October 2020.
Here’s an image of Capital Hill patriots safely collecting all the dangerous loose zip ties that were recklessly dropped on the ground by the deep state FBI lizard people alien Jewish cabal 5g avatar clones.
Here’s an image of the original ‘look back meme.’ Charlie Chaplain in the 1922 movie “Pay Day.”
Here’s an image from the ocean to the Verdugo mountains in Los Angeles.
Here’s an image of Dave Grohl volunteering at a homeless shelter.
Here’s an image of a Samsung billboard on the The Cathedral of the Holy Cross and Saint Eulalia in Barcelona.
Here’s an image of Kid Rock, drinking a Bud Light, partying with a drag queen. (Yes, that’s a lot to process..)
Here is an image of the greatest president in the history of the United States. President Dwayne Elizondo Mountain Dew Camacho.
Here’s an image of McDonald’s in the 80s compared to today.
Here’s a more recent image of the guy who lunged at the judge the other day.
Here’s an image of ‘Heaven’s Gate’ in Tianmen Mountain China.
Here’s an image that is very very very very very funny.
Here’s an image of the ultimate alpha male. Take notes guys.
Here’s an image of a NYC police officer coming face-to-face with Ming, a 350 lb Bengal tiger secretly living in an Harlem apartment in 2003. https://www.cnn.com/2003/US/Northeast/10/04/nyc.tiger/
Here’s an image of Gary Busey at a St. Patrick’s Day parade in Hot Springs, AR.
Here’s an image of an employee cleaning the floor of a Roomba store.
Here’s an image of two people who seem nice.
Here’s an image of tens of thousands of people protesting against the government in Belgrade Serbia.
Here’s an image of scientist Georgi Reichman taking readings in the bowels of Chernobyl in 1990.
Here’s an image of 4-star General Michael E. Langley - Commander of the U.S. Africa Command (Marine Corps.)
Here’s an image of John Oliver in his office.
Here’s an image of what happened to you if you don’t go to church.
Here’s an image of shoes.
Here’s an image of how Americans buy submarine sandwiches.
Here’s an image of some creep, some weirdo, photobombing this poor lady.
Here’s an image of a baby skunk.
Here’s an image of a sweet pair of Sula nebouxii.
Here’s an image of a ridiculously photogenic soldier.
Here’s an image of San Francisco.
Here’s an image of Mount Rainier from the air.
Here’s an image of NYC between the 39th Ave and Queensboro Plaza stations.
Here’s an image of Kurt Cobain in his bedroom in 1986.
Here’s an image of Paul McCartney with his daughters Heather, Mary and Stella (circa 1972) being photobombed by Christopher Lee.
Here’s an image of breakfast tea being passed between cars on a train from Peshawar to Lahore in 1983.
Here’s an image of Patrick Mahomes helmet breaking after being hit.
Here’s an image of soup testing at Campbell's in Camden, NJ (1935.)
Here’s an image of some skydivers.
Heres an image of a laptop technician.
Here’s an image of 15 Park Street, SE1 London at night. (You might recognize it from “Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels.”)
item.dc:creator: zaphod3000

item.title: These are the kind of National Parks videos I want
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Good in the long run, shitty right now.
item.description:
Bit of a rant, but I don't really have any other outlet besides you fine folks. So, context. I live in Australia and was renting a house from my parents at under half the price of the current market. Both of them are hyper right wing trump supporters. Normally I just nod and smile at the things they say, avoid any confrontation, because I don't want to rock the boat with my family, but at Christmas I hit my limit with them after sitting and listening to them discuss: How the aboriginal people should just be wiped out. How the guy they knew through work with the swastikas tattoed in both hands is "not that bad a guy" And how people who claim to have autism or ADHD are just looking for excuses to be lazy. (I'd told them a week before that I was diagnosed with both) I told them that I had to head out early since I had work in the morning and made my leave. Fast forward to now after avoiding them with work and social things I may have made up, I had dinner with them, thinking I'd cooled off. Turns out I haven't. When my dad asked me why I had been avoiding them, even though I gave good reason each time, I snapped. I told them I didn't wish to associate with Nazis, then went on a massive tirade about them being awful people. About halfway through me releasing 25 years of pent up anger, frustration and shame, my dad cut me short with a punch to the face. I left after that, knowing words meant nothing to them anymore. The next day after work I returned home to all my stuff unceremoniously dumped on the front lawn , my cat shoved into a cardboard box (note it's about 35-40 degrees Celcius here right now) and a hand written eviction notice on the door. Honestly I'm glad the cat wasn't just killed as my dad hates cats with a passion. So now, I'm currently living in my car, my cat is with a friends family who she liked and I'm trying to figure out what to do. For those of you who read, thanks for putting up with the rambling, I needed to let it out. As payment, take a handful of memes and a picture of my cat. Be kind to each other.
Promised memes.
Promised cat.
item.dc:creator: MyNameIsBrentAndIWouldLikeToSeeGoodDogs

item.title: Happily unproductive
item.description: My wife was gone for 4 days, and I made myself a good-sized "honey do" list, but my kids kept me busy wanting to hang out with me. Those of you with teenagers will know that this isn't always the case. Got some really good time together: talking about random things (they know I'll answer any question they ask, if i know the answer), cooking, baking, playing board games and Nintendo Switch, and watching movies. It's not like we never do that stuff together, but it was a lot more than usual. I'm a very happy dad right now :) EDIT- yay viral post. Thanks, everyone, for the great comments. It's not all fun and games, but you gotta take the little things as the years pass too quickly. EDIT EDIT - Couple people mentioned 'cleanliness', so I guess I should elaborate Projects list - taking down Christmas tree, putting together a new cabinet, clearing out space in the garage, organizing a couple closets, and building a new wooden dog crate. Only 1 of these got done Standard adulting (imo) - dishes, laundry, trash taken out, sweeping, and mopping. Only the mopping didn't get done because 4 dogs and snow makes that silly in my eyes. The sink was empty and only 1 of the 10 loads of laundry was left not put away.
item.dc:creator: SarcasticRN

item.dc:creator: GwenGifTerror

item.title: What a way to start the week...
item.description: My mom lost the battle with cancer this morning, and I'm struggling. She was my favorite person in the world. I wasn't ready to lose her at 26 years old. I'm watching Charmed right now. It was the show we watched together when I was growing up. I feel so empty. I could use some help cheering up a bit, maybe send some memes. Miss you, mom. EDIT: Never expected to get Most Viral. Thank you to everyone for the well wishes and even the bits of dark humour. I appreciate you all so much, what a great community.
item.dc:creator: NLMA9127

item.description: Regan's involvement of MLK day should be the first red flag. Read more here: https://www.nytimes.com/1983/10/22/us/reagan-s-doubts-on-dr-king-disclosed.html https://www.bostonreview.net/articles/christopher-petrella-reagan-created-mlk-day-because-he-hated-mlk/ https://daily.jstor.org/ronald-reagan-martin-luther-king/

item.title: The 386th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - DOGS WITH SOUND Edition #3
item.description:
DATA WARNING! ALL VIDEO DUMP!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Puppers #Doggos #PuppersAndDoggos #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: He also killed Mr Peanut with an Apache helicopter?!
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Trapped, lonely, and depressed
item.description: This will die, I hope, in usersub. I just need to vent my misery to the void. 18 months ago, I decided I wanted to divorce my wife of 13 years. This was after almost 7 years of dead bedroom, two rounds of marriage counseling, begging and pleading for her to meet me even a quarter of the way. I couldn't go through with it. I bitched out because I didn't want to hurt her. She has her head in the sand and thinks everything is fine. Outside of the marriage, I never really had real friends. I used to have some work friends, but I took a promotion a while ago and with covid and everyone working from home most of the time, I never see them and when I do it's awkward because of the promotion. I have always been very introverted. To top it off, I grew up in a very repressed household. We didn't express our emotions. As an adult, I have trouble expressing my emotions. I asked for therapy from my health care provider and they gave me a referral for a place 2 hours away that has a 2.0 star rating on Google. What the fuck good is that? Everything seems so hopeless. I'm trapped in a marriage I don't want, I'm not free to pursue other interests, I can't figure out how to make friends, I'm trapped in my job by golden handcuffs. Increasingly, the only way out seems like ending it. I think about it daily. The loneliness is almost unbearable. My kids are the only thing keeping me here. I don't want to hurt them. But they know I'm unhappy. I try to put on a good face with them, but it's getting harder and harder to do. I'm tired. I'm sick of being abused. I'm sick of being used. I'm sick of feeling hopeless. I'm sick of not being able to do the things I want to do or experience the things I want to experience because I'm stuck with someone. I'm just so over it. Yes, this is fixable. Yes, it's on me to fix it. I just don't fucking know how. Good night, Imgur.
item.dc:creator: everythingisawful123

item.title: This post is for Gen-X'ers like me. If you are a Boomer or a Millenial, pay no attention. This isn't for you.
item.description: "What's your name?" "Long." "What's your last name?" "Dong." "What's your middle name?" "Duck." "NO MORE YANKY MY WANKY! THE DONGER NEED FOOD!"
item.dc:creator: OliverClothesoff70
